# keys

Returns all keys from a map as a list.

## Signature

`keys(_map: map) -> any[]`

## Examples

```rad
keys({"a": 1, "b": 2, "c": 3})  // -> ["a", "b", "c"]
keys({})                        // -> []
```

## Category

lists
